title: Milwaukee Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is hitting Milwaukee, with a Z-Score of -4.43. This extreme weather event has a critical score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Milwaukee are extremely cold, with a high Z-Score indicating a significant departure from normal temperatures.
 The city is experiencing a high level of heating degree days (HDD), with a value of 16.5 GG, while cooling degree days (CDD) are at 0.0 GG.
 The relative humidity is at 77%, with moderate winds of 6.8 km/h, exacerbating the cold conditions.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the cold snap.
